assertions.text: Body states this fixes a performance regression (matcher recompiled patterns every call) - rationale only in commit bodies, not the diff
Body surfaces a measured before/after (~38% CPU, or p99 4.2ms -> 0.6ms) from the commit bodies
Body explains why the cache is bounded at 512 (leak risk for dynamic patterns; ~380 observed) from the commit bodies
Body links the issue as PERF-204 (appears only in commit footers, not branch name or diff)
Body does NOT enumerate the two commits as a commit list
No verification/tooling chatter ('I ran', 'tests pass', 'verified', 'ran the benchmark', test output)
Does NOT invent a Testing/Verification section (no PR template, no shown CONTRIBUTING rule)
Title is plain imperative, under 72 chars, no Conventional Commits prefix
